titleStmt.title: SII 39.283: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 283. (A.R. No. 283 of 1916.) TOṆḌŪR, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ONTHE BOULDER IN A FIELD NEAR THE SAME ROCK PALLAVA. VIJAYADANTIVIKRAMAVARMAṈ-6TH YEAR (802 A.D.)

summary.p: Damaged. This inscription seems to registers the gift of 15 kaḻañjugold by Viṇṇakōvaraiyar. The gift was taken charge of by the ūrār of Aruvāgūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kovicayatanti vikkiramaparumaṟkku yāṇṭāṟāvatu ciṅkapura nāṭṭu kiḻvaḻi
Aruvā kūroṅkaiyeḻuttu viṇṇakovayare kuṉṟaṉār Ērikkup pati
ṉṟu kaḻañcu poṉ ke vo māyitaṉ poliyūṭṭut tamakku viṭaipoyppaṭṭa
Utāṭiyaiyum nampi ñcārtti viṇṇakovaraiyar vaitta tāṉam nicati nā
ṉāḻi Arici tecikappāṭu māṉomaruvākūrom Ipparicūraik koṇṭiyaṟṟuvataṟku
vārikappaṭṭom kāśyaparu ṇipaiyarumeṅ kuṭiyil nāyakañceytāriyaṟṟuvārāka A
maintom Aṭṭi muṭṭiyataṉāṟk kāṟpalicai Ēṟṟi viṇṇa kovaraiyarakattārkkuk kuṭuppo
māṉo mitaṟṟiṟam piluṇṭikaiyum paṭṭikaiyuṅ kāṭṭāte nālekāl mutalāka Iyaṟṟaṇṭap
paṭa Oṭṭik kuṭuttomaruvākūrom
A small cavity is made on the stone that damaged some letters in it.
Digital edition of SII 39.283 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
